citation: Singapore Code of Advertising Practice — Rule 2.4 (Influencer content)
summary: Paid influencer and branded content must be clearly disclosed as advertising across all formats.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: Influencer posts, gifted product reviews, or affiliate promotions. ACTION: REWRITE — add clear sponsorship disclosure. CHECK: Hashtags, captions, video overlays, and platform-native ad labels. ESCALATE IF: Covert promotion without #ad, Paid Partnership, or equivalent.
